title: Origin of the EoE was based on original scripts rumour episode 19 was to be rerecorded
display_title: Origin of the EoE was based on original scripts rumour episode 19 was to be rerecorded
wikitext:
[]: Origin of the "EoE was based on original scripts" rumour + episode 19 was to be rerecorded?             Quote Post by eldomtom2 » Tue Mar 26, 2019 6:07 pm I've been digging through Usenet for contemprary reactions to EoE, and I found this post by Michael House translating a statement by Gainax publicity manager Sato Hiroki: https://groups.google.com/forum/#!search/%22evangelion%22$20after$3A1996$2F03$2F26$20before$3A1996$2F04$2F15/rec.arts.anime/TVuq-qPoGmM/1IrLqhHPfoEJ "Shinseiki Evangelion" (Neon Genesis Evangelion) concluded its original broadcast run recently, much to the chagrin of its fans. But it has been learned that episodes 25 and 26 will be remade, using their original scripts. Additionally, the dialogue for Episode 19 will be rerecorded, and episodes 21-24 will have extensive retake footage. All of these retakes, as well as the redone versions of Episodes 25 and 26, will be included in the laserdisc release of the series, with the final disc scheduled to include both the original TV versions of the last two episodes, as well as the remakes. Look for release schedules in upcoming issues of various related publications. Further information will be released as it becomes available. Sato Hiroki, Publicity Manager, GAINAX Co., Ltd. 1996.4.7

[]: Re: Origin of the "EoE was based on original scripts" rumour + episode 19 was to be rerecorded?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Mar 26, 2019 7:16 pm nor can I think of a reason why such would be necessary.
